title: Electro-dart

{{Quote|It's just an electro-dart. Don't be such a baby.|Hurd Coyle, to HOB-147|<ref name="Salvaged" />}}
An '''electro-dart''' or '''electro dart''' was a type of [[Dart/Legends|dart]] designed to temporarily [[Stun/Legends|stun]] an [[Sentience/Legends|organic]] target by sending an electric current through the victim's body. The dart was a common weapon among [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] in the era of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]. The [[Scavenger/Legends|salvager]] [[Hurd Coyle]] utilized electro-darts in the [[Time/Legends|time]] soon after the [[Declaration of a New Order|rise]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. When Coyle rescued the [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilot]] [[HOB-147]], who had been stranded in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] for several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]], the salvager was forced to subdue the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] twice with electro-darts because HOB-147 acted aggressively toward the smuggler, whom he falsely believed was working for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Description==
The electro-dart or electro dart was type of [[Dart/Legends|dart]] intended to temporarily [[Stun/Legends|stun]] an [[Sentience/Legends|organic]] being by sending an electric current through the target's body. The weapon was composed of a clear cylinder attached to a needle, which stuck into its target and transmitted the electric current upon contact. The electro-dart was fired from a hand-held<ref name="Salvaged" /> or gauntlet-integrated [[dart shooter]].<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|Oh no. Not again!|HOB-147, after being shot a second time with an electro-dart|<ref name="Salvaged" />}}
During the era of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], electro-darts were common tools of the trade for [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], who used them to paralyze targets.<ref name="TOR" /> [[Hurd Coyle]], a [[Scavenger/Legends|salvager]] active following the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|end]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], utilized electro-darts for defensive purposes aboard his [[Hurd Coyle's ship|salvaging ship]]. Soon after the rise of the Empire, Coyle rescued the [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilot]] [[HOB-147]], who had been stranded for [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] in his damaged [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|V-19 Torrent starfighter]] and was floating through [[Realspace/Legends|space]] unconscious following a battle during the Clone Wars. HOB, unaware that the Clone Wars were over and that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] he had once served was now the Empire, awoke in the medical bay of Coyle's [[Starship/Legends|ship]], where he was confronted by a group of reprogrammed [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s that worked for Coyle.<ref name="Salvaged" />

HOB incorrectly assumed that he was aboard a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] craft and attacked the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Coyle, having entered the sickbay, shot the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] with an electro-dart to stop him from destroying all of his [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. Coyle relocated the incapacitated HOB-147 elsewhere aboard the ship and left him to regain his faculties. Unbeknownst to HOB-147, Coyle was transporting a group of fugitive [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi younglings]] to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. When HOB came to, he found himself being watched by [[Nia]], one of the younglings aboard the vessel. The clone grabbed her, but Coyle walked into the room and shot the trooper with another electro-dart. With HOB-147 paralyzed again, Coyle took Nia out of the room for her protection.<ref name="Salvaged" />

==Behind the scenes==
The electro-dart made its first appearance in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[Salvaged]]'', written and drawn by the [[Fillbach Brothers]] and published in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 9]]'' on [[October 24]], [[2007]]. They also appear in the [[2011]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' as "Electro Dart," a stun ability used by players of the Bounty Hunter class.
